summary: Orchestration and review guidance now treat amendments as reviewed derived-strategy changes. Approved anchors remain non-runtime-mutable and anchor/authority changes require human reapproval.
proof: Updated orchestrating-cybernetic-pregoal to describe lean default and full exception.
Updated reviewing-cybernetic-control-structures runtime suitability language to require anchor preservation or human reapproval.
Updated writing-cybernetic-execution-policies to allow generation strategy with reviewed amendment boundaries.
